calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Branden E. Bickel, Esq. for Plaintiff: Eureka Garden homeowners Association, a California nonprofit corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness Suzanne Eisenhut, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Michael Blevins as follows:
Damages $50,506.91
Attorney Fees $7,606.67
Costs $335.00
Interest at the rate of 12% on unpaid balance, see scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
